items.desc: 9mm sidearm. USE equips it.
items.name: Pistol

items.desc: Doors, howlers, arguments. USE equips it.
items.name: Pump shotgun

items.desc: For things with wheels. USE equips it.
items.name: Pipe rocket launcher

items.desc: Quiet, heavy, honest. USE equips it.
items.name: Wrench

items.desc: Quiet and mean. USE equips it.
items.name: Machete

items.desc: Throw with G.
items.name: Grenade

items.desc: Feeds the pistol.
items.name: 9mm rounds

items.desc: Feeds the shotgun.
items.name: 12ga shells

items.desc: Feeds the pipe launcher.
items.name: Rocket

items.desc: Stops bleeding, treats the worst wound (+30).
items.name: Bandage

items.desc: The real thing: stops bleeding, treats EVERY part (+25).
items.name: Field medkit

items.desc: Takes the edge off — worst wound +12, nerves −8.
items.name: Painkillers

items.desc: Settles the nerves (−18 stress). Dogs love it (E to feed).
items.name: Dried meat

items.desc: A cured wild hide. Traders pay for the good ones.
items.name: Cured hide

items.desc: A hot meal: worst wound +10, stress −10.
items.name: Canned beans

items.desc: Cold and clean. Refills your stamina, stress −6.
items.name: Canteen

items.desc: Stamina +40 and the shakes settle (−15 stress).
items.name: Trail coffee

items.desc: Stress −30. Your torso pays a little (−4).
items.name: Rotgut whiskey

items.desc: +40 fuel into a rig within reach.
items.name: Jerry can (fuel)

items.desc: Field-repairs a rig's worst component (+35).
items.name: Salvaged car parts

items.desc: Patches a rig's tires (+50).
items.name: Tire patch kit

items.desc: Holds a chassis together (+12). Briefly.
items.name: Duct tape

items.desc: 30 seconds of burning red light. The dark blinks first.
items.name: Road flare

items.desc: Salvaged FEDNET eye. Plant it watching a road; V cycles to its feed.
items.name: Surveillance camera

items.desc: Key it and LISTEN — movement bleeds through the static.
items.name: Walkie-talkie

items.desc: Pings you when something crosses it. The cheapest guard dog alive.
items.name: Motion sensor

items.desc: Opens locked doors the quiet way. Hold E at a locked car.
items.name: Lockpick

items.desc: USE to read. Gears, gas and the handbrake — the road, explained.
items.name: Driver's Handbook

items.desc: USE to read. Crouching, punching, and not drowning.
items.name: Manual: On Foot

items.desc: USE to read. Whistles, bonds, and the dog's eye.
items.name: Manual: The Pack

items.desc: USE to read. The safehouse, the clock, and going down.
items.name: Manual: Home & Survival

items.desc: USE to read. Drones, cameras, and voices in the static.
items.name: Manual: Gadgets & Signals

items.desc: USE to read. Ten gates, one countdown, THE DIAL.
items.name: Manual: The Carousel

items.desc: USE to read. Rulers, respect, and the night.
items.name: Manual: The Divided States

items.desc: Somebody's road knowledge — marks a town on YOUR map.
items.name: Map fragment

items.desc: One eye, half the arc. Looks great.
items.name: Eye patch

items.desc: USE deploys the bird — it patrols and pings threats. Deploying hands you the REMOTE.
items.name: Scout drone

items.desc: USE takes the stick of your bird in the sky. Dies with the bird.
items.name: Drone remote

items.desc: The wasteland's raw material.
items.name: Scrap metal

items.desc: What passes for money out here.
items.name: Jack (coin)

items.desc: A tin of pre-Collapse field rations. USE to eat — dense fuel for the road.
items.name: Field ration

items.desc: Someone's spare shirt and jeans. Worth a trade, warms nobody twice.
items.name: Clothes

items.desc: Keeps a firearm from seizing up. Feeds a gun-cleaning kit.
items.name: Gun oil

items.desc: A stamped slip where your gun used to be. The law took it, not a thief.
items.name: Confiscation notice

items.desc: Someone's paperwork — a name, a date, a reason to be curious.
items.name: Case file
Antibiotics
items.desc: A sealed course. With a full night in a bed, it breaks BITE FEVER — nothing else does.
A hand-cranked pocket game system. USE opens the handheld cartridge library; it stays in your pack.
items.name: Pocket Game Deck

items.desc: Copied routing firmware for the Pocket Game Deck. USE installs RADWORM on the shelf.
items.name: Firmware: RADWORM

items.desc: A demining drill on a scarred memory wafer. USE installs DEAD GROUND.
items.name: Firmware: DEAD GROUND

items.desc: Warehouse training firmware with a hand-drawn rat. USE installs PACK RAT.
items.name: Firmware: PACK RAT

items.desc: A portrait-format bunker breaching wafer. USE installs BUNKER BREAKER.
items.name: Firmware: BUNKER BREAKER

items.desc: Highway courier certification firmware. USE installs LAST MILE.
items.name: Firmware: LAST MILE

items.desc: Black Week civil-defense firmware. USE installs IRON DOME.
items.name: Firmware: IRON DOME

items.desc: Supply-capsule flight training firmware. USE installs FALL LINE.
items.name: Firmware: FALL LINE

items.desc: A roadhouse table image copied off a dashboard board. USE installs TILT//SALVAGE.
items.name: Firmware: TILT//SALVAGE

items.desc: Radio-repair teaching firmware. USE installs RELAY BLOOM.
items.name: Firmware: RELAY BLOOM

items.desc: A thick amber arena cartridge. USE installs DIAL TANKS.
items.name: Cartridge: DIAL TANKS

items.desc: An artillery cartridge with a red weather stripe. USE installs RED SKY.
items.name: Cartridge: RED SKY

items.desc: A salvage-company orbital claim cartridge. USE installs BLACK ORBIT.
items.name: Cartridge: BLACK ORBIT

items.desc: A sabotage maze cartridge in a cracked grid case. USE installs GRIDBREACH.
items.name: Cartridge: GRIDBREACH

items.desc: Bumper-yard league media with dents around the contacts. USE installs RUSTBALL.

items.desc: Refinery capture-racing media that smells like fuel. USE installs FUEL RUN.
items.name: Cartridge: FUEL RUN

items.desc: County-fair aerial duel media. USE installs SKYJOUST.
items.name: Cartridge: SKYJOUST

items.desc: A stamped fight-night prize cartridge. USE installs FIGHT NIGHT '99.
items.name: Prize Cartridge: FIGHT NIGHT '99

items.desc: A mil-spec tactical cartridge recovered from an academy cache. USE installs ASHLAND COMMAND.
items.name: Military Cartridge: ASHLAND COMMAND
